name: Drive Thru History: Acts to Revelation
original_name: Drive Thru History: Acts to Revelation
overview: Dave Stotts explores the amazing lives of the very first Christians. Beginning in Jerusalem and using the Book of Acts as a roadmap, Dave travels the Mediterranean region to share the people, places, and events that launched the Christian faith.

trailers.title: Drive Thru History® – “Acts to Revelation”: TRAILER
Drive Thru History: Acts To Revelation (Countdown) | Premieres April 11
